purpose: Owns process step 1: Resolve configuration snapshot.
Owns process step 2: Emit schedule tick (calendar polling cadence).
Owns process step 3: Poll calendar source(s).
Owns process step 4: Normalize raw calendar entries.
Owns process step 5: Persist calendar events (append-only).
Owns process step 6: Build anticipation triggers from calendar.
Owns process step 7: Ingest market ticks.
Owns process step 8: Aggregate ticks into bars.
Owns process step 9: Compute indicators.
Owns process step 10: Assemble strategy feature frame.
Owns process step 11: Generate signal (or suppression).
Owns process step 12: Convert signal to trade intent.
Owns process step 13: Evaluate risk and size.
Owns process step 14: Compile order intent.
Owns process step 15: Route order to broker.
Owns process step 16: Serialize and send to MT4 adapter.
responsibilities: Serialize and send to MT4 adapter

purpose: Owns process step 17: EA executes broker order.
Owns process step 18: Normalize broker events to canonical reports.
responsibilities: Normalize broker events to canonical reports

purpose: Owns process step 19: Apply execution reports to OMS state.
responsibilities: Apply execution reports to OMS state

purpose: Owns process step 20: Classify trade close and compute canonical PnL.
responsibilities: Classify trade close and compute canonical PnL

purpose: Owns process step 21: Bucketize outcome.
Owns process step 22: Compute event proximity.
Owns process step 23: Lookup matrix decision.
Owns process step 24: Build reentry trade intent (or suppress).
Owns process step 25: Loop: reentry intent follows same risk->order->route->transport->execute chain.
responsibilities: Loop: reentry intent follows same risk->order->route->transport->execute chain

purpose: Owns process step 26: Health aggregation + SLO evaluation.
